allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Add auto-push hook for git commits *)
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; [print\(x['type'], x['name']\) for x in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
Bash(git commit -m 'Restore auto-push hook in worktree settings + tidy permissions *)

Bash(git commit -m 'Fix boss patrol bounds, remove Eye Track UI, make bio badge unmissable, tame mead+horn SFX *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Add bio achievements, mobile/Safari banner, bio-reactive music; bump cache key *)
